professional_summary: As a Full Stack software engineer specializing in AI, I blend my École 42 education in Paris with hands- on experience gained during my internship at where I developed secure GPTs at the forefront of artificial intelligence innovation. My track record includes numerous successful projects and three hackathon victories, reflecting my entrepreneurial spirit, creative problem-solving abilities, and exceptional adaptability. This combination of expertise and innovative thinking allows me to approach challenges with both efficiency and consistently delivering solutions that exceed expectations.

experience.description:
Worked on adding new features for AI tools such as MCP
Implement a DeepSearch Feature. Enabling the AI to research a topic deeply by combining internal documents + live web results into a final report
Developed connectors for Google Drive, and Teams to sync documents into our company's AI platform for RAG capabilities
Developed specialized web scraping for AI
Built custom tool integrations for AI agents

projects.name: Transcendence
projects.description:
Group project to create a full web application (online Pong game) with features including chat, matchmaking, 2FA and JWT, multiplayer management with websockets.
Implemented a REST API with Django and created a SPA in vanilla JS.

projects.name: Minishell
projects.description: Designed a command interpreter similar to Bash in C, managing complex features such as environment variables, program execution, pipes, and redirections.

projects.name: Inception
projects.description: Advanced Docker configuration to a multi-container environment including WordPress, reverse-proxy, and SSL certificates, using Docker and docker-compose.

projects.name: DEFAI

Built DEFAI at ETHOXford, then evolved it into for Paris Blockchain Week & Colosseum
Created an AI agent interface designed to make Web3 feel effortless — sending, swapping, signing contracts, all through a smooth chat UI
Project available at: https://synto.fun

projects.name: Gotta Go Hack AI Hackathon
